div1.entryFree: Embassage, message, errand: to thee I send this written e. Sonn. 26, 3. I have almost matter enough in me for such an e. Ado I, 1, 282. do you any e. to the Pigmies, II, 1, 277. conned his e. LLL V, 2, 98. nimble mischance, doth not thy e. belong to me? R2 III, 4, 93. I expect an e. from my Redeemer to redeem me hence, R3 II, 1, 3.
